title: Oreogrammitis curtisii
taxonomy: Oreogrammitis curtisii is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Oreogrammitis. This fern is native to Malaysia and is often found in humid, tropical environments. The classification of O. curtisii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Polypodiaceae family. As a species within this family, O. curtisii is part of a diverse group of ferns.
